items.title: Mixed messages from Trump leave more questions than answers over war's end
items.summary: The US president has tried to soothe nerves over oil and markets, but his comments still lack clarity, writes Anthony Zurcher.

items.title: Five Iranian footballers granted Australian visas after anthem protest
items.summary: Concern has grown for team after one critic called them "wartime traitors" for failing to salute during the Iranian anthem.

items.title: Lebanon calls for talks with Israel on plan to end Hezbollah conflict
items.summary: President Aoun outlines a path towards "permanent security and stability", as Israeli strikes targeting Hezbollah continue.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美以對伊朗戰爭目標現分歧 川普面臨國內政治壓力
items.summary: 美國與以色列聯手攻擊伊朗10天後，美國總統川普面臨政治壓力，也不認同以色列的長期目標。在民眾對戰爭的看法上，兩國出現明顯分歧，大多數以色列人熱烈支持這場行動，美國人的支持率卻...…

items.title: 美軍考慮護航荷姆茲海峽 防長赫格塞斯：加強攻擊伊朗
items.summary: 美國國防部長赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）宣布，美國今（10）日將加強攻擊伊朗的力道，參謀長聯席會議主席凱恩（Dan Caine）則說，美軍正在多方考慮護送船隻通過荷姆茲海...…

items.title: 美戰爭部長：將再對伊朗發動最猛烈打擊
items.summary: 美國戰爭部長赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）表示，美國今天將加強攻擊伊朗，發動自10天前華府開戰以來最猛烈的打擊。  法新社報導，赫格塞斯在五角大廈舉行的記者會上表示：「今天將再度成...…
